description: Composition:Brown leather sandals with cut outs and appliquesshoe care:Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustFitting:Regular FitThese rich brown sandals from catwalk are simple yet elegant. The minimal cut outs and applique work accentauate the beauty of your feet.  Team these with smart casuals or semi formal wear for outings with friends, trips to the mall and much more, accentuating your feet and flaunting your style mantra.
